name: Killing Richard Glossip
overview: The profiles of two condemned men in Oklahoma - Richard Glossip and Justin Sneed - and their two very different accounts of the murder of Barry Van Treese. Richard Glossip waits on death row saying he is an innocent man while Sneed cut a deal: testify against Glossip in exchange for a life sentence.

trailers.title: Killing Richard Glossip | Starts Mon. April 17th at 9/8c
